notes: SHIP v1.14.315 - HOLD-TO-EXIT (freeze & wake) (handoff 'HANDOFF-hold-to-exit.md' + owner 'a' = wrapper nav approach + author the curtain CSS myself + build now). A deliberate, glove-safe way out: a gold EXIT hold-target in the bottom nav that freezes the app to a black sleep curtain (state saved), with a hold-to-wake that restores exactly where the tech was. HONEST CONSTRAINT (baked into the copy, not fought): a PWA cannot force-quit iOS, so 'exit' = freeze/sleep curtain + guaranteed state save, reversible - NO copy claims it 'closes iOS'. Redesign-only (body.rd); ?legacy=1 byte-identical. FOUR parts. (1) NAV wrapper (rail-safe, my approach per owner 'a' - the handoff's own in-flow #rd-exit would have shifted the 3 flex:1 botitems off their thirds and misaligned the #bn-core rail): wrapped #bn-core + the 3 botitems in a new `#bn-rail{position:relative;flex:1;display:flex}` so the reactor rail keeps its thirds-of-the-wrapper % math (rail JS `_core.style.left=(idx*33.333)%` UNTOUCHED - it now resolves against #bn-rail), and hung the SET-APART gold `#rd-exit` beside it (no rail participation, never a landable tab). (2) #rd-exit + charge CSS = handoff verbatim (gold rgba(244,196,48,*) border/charge/glow, var(--gold) text, .85s scaleX charge). (3) FREEZE + CURTAIN + WAKE: `rd_holdGesture(el,armClass,onDone)` (~850ms hold, visible charge, early release = cancel, haptic on arm[4]/fire[6,30,6] via existing haptic()); `rd_freeze()` blurs the active editor (flush open input e.g. a handoff draft) + stamps `phantom_freeze_v1`={mode:_rdMode,ts} via safeStore (NO full snapshot - per-domain persistence already has the data; the marker carries only the VIEW) + raises `#rd-freeze-curtain` (full-screen black overlay, authored since the referenced phantom-exit-prototype.html was NOT provided - PHANTOM.FROZEN label + a 150px SVG hold-to-wake charge ring [stroke-dashoffset 452->0 over .85s] + mint 'shift state saved . nothing lost'); `rd_wake()` drops the curtain + clears the marker. Wired on DOMContentLoaded behind the redesign guard, idempotent (_rdWired). (4) FREEZE BOOT-RESTORE (redesign-only IIFE): `_session_bootRestore` early-returns under redesign (confirmed L17814) so freeze needs its own hook - on boot, if redesign on + a freeze marker survived a Safari kill, `showMode(mark.mode)` lands back on the saved page then clears the marker (does NOT re-trigger the legacy resume banner; lands on the page ready-to-work, not stuck behind a curtain). Gates: whole-file brace balance 11831->11891 (+60, all from the new balanced CSS+JS), all 4 inline <script> blocks vm.Script-compile clean, version triple .314->.315 lockstep, uniform LF, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (every selector body.rd/#rd-*-scoped; #rd-botnav is redesign-only so the wrapper+EXIT never render in legacy; curtain is display:none until rd_freeze [redesign-guarded wiring] raises .up; boot-restore + wiring both early-return when !redesign_isOn). DEVICE-VERIFY (John - hard gate): (1) tap EXIT quickly -> nothing (tap != hold); (2) hold EXIT -> gold bar charges, lift early -> cancels no freeze; (3) full hold -> black frozen curtain, haptic fires; (4) hold WAKE ring -> returns to the exact page you left; (5) freeze -> hard-kill Safari -> relaunch -> lands back on the frozen page, open handoff draft still intact; (6) confirm 0.85s feels right with a glove (adjust RD_HOLD_MS); (7) the COMMAND/WORK/CRASH-CART rail underline still lines up under each tab (wrapper didn't shift it); (8) ?legacy=1 unchanged. Browser-verified localhost: rail aligned with 3 tabs + EXIT set-apart, tap!=hold, hold->curtain, wake->restore, marker set/cleared. OPEN owner calls (flagged): the §3 handoff-draft flush uses blur()+continuous-persistence (no single named draft-save fn found - if device-verify #5 shows a lost draft, wire the specific save); on relaunch-after-kill it lands on the page (not re-showing the curtain) - tweak if you want the curtain re-shown. Consolidated batch-verify gate for .302->.315 stack. NEXT: N-12 phase stepper (backlog).
